name: LegacyTexas Financial Group, Inc.
description: LegacyTexas Financial Group, Inc. was a commercially oriented community bank holding company headquartered in Plano, Texas. It served local entrepreneurs, businesses, and families across North Texas for over 60 years, providing a range of financial services through its subsidiary, LegacyTexas Bank. The institution grew to become one of the largest locally based banks in the region with significant assets and numerous branch locations. In 2019, LegacyTexas Financial Group was acquired by Prosperity Bancshares, Inc., and its banking operations were subsequently rebranded under the Prosperity Bank name.
